design_philosophy: Objective, function-first, and highly structured. A command-center feel for investors and builders, emphasizing clarity of data.

layout_and_spacing.container_padding: p-6 or p-8 inside bordered containers
layout_and_spacing.dashboard_grid: MODE B: 'Control Room' grid. Base grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 with gap-4 or gap-6.
layout_and_spacing.alignment: Strict left-alignment for data and forms.
layout_and_spacing.border_radius: max 8px. Strictly cardless or sharp edges preferred.

surface_strategies.header: Crystal Glass: backdrop-blur-xl bg-black/60 with 1px border-white/10.
surface_strategies.dashboard_cards: Grid Borders: Flat backgrounds, 1px subtle border, no shadows.
surface_strategies.hover_states: translate-y-[-4px], border-white/30, explicit hover text colors.

hero_abstract_bg.description: Deep blue and black abstract data network pattern.

builder_avatar_1.description: Grayscale photo of a female builder.

builder_avatar_2.description: Portrait of a female builder wearing black shirt.

revenue_crypto_asset.description: Silver and gold coins, use as visual cue for USDY yields.

instructions_to_main_agent: Write components in .js/.jsx files (not .tsx) as requested.
Install 'Chivo' and 'IBM Plex Sans' via Google Fonts.
Implement 'Control Room' grid layout for the Investor Portfolio and Idea Transparency queues.
EVM Wallet Connection must be placed prominently in the sticky top navigation bar.
Apply data-testid attributes to ALL interactive elements (buttons, links, inputs) using kebab-case and role-based naming (e.g., data-testid='connect-wallet-button').
Never center-align headings by default; strictly left-align text to maintain the Swiss aesthetic.
For the AI Investment recommendations, use the accent_ai color (#2563EB) for visual indicators.
Use Tailwind's border-collapse and 1px borders to achieve the 'Technical Grid' look for data-heavy widgets.
